case_title: BERTHA M. CAVIT VS. BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $530.24 FILED BY CAVIT, BERTHA M. AS TO DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVIT, BERTHA M. AS TO DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVIT, BERTHA M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED JUN-11-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-19-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JAMES F. BLANDING--PRESIDENT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
